source_pr.title: executor: fix the forever hang in index merge join when oom occurs
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #17394 
Problem Summary: As the title says.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: close the results channel for the panic inner task.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- fix the forever hang in index merge join when oom occurs

fix_pattern: executor: fix the forever hang in index merge join when oom occurs

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix the forever hang in index merge join when OOM occurs.
evidence: diff closes task.results and cancels worker on OOM path; adds a test that asserts it doesn't hang (executor/index_lookup_merge_join.go, executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go).
